results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Stateful multi-LLM agent framework + shared persistent state IS the flame-keeper persistent shared context anchor mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Persistent memory stores all state transitions + dual-stream IS the continuous-anchor persistent-context mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Token-level round-robin sequential interleaved generation in shared auto-regressive context IS the K-participant voice-rotation in shared flame-keeper context mechanism.
EXACT TWIN — Turn-level rewards + intermediate rewards IS the cohesion bonus per-turn output mechanism.
MCP shared-context architecture covers flame-keeper persistent shared state paradigm.
Shared memory tier covers flame-keeper shared-context mechanism.
Multi-turn LLM agent scheduling + KV cache TTL covers persistent-context multi-turn mechanism.
Multi-turn reasoning RL with GRPO/PPO + turn-level rewards covers voice-rotation + cohesion bonus mechanism.
